[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110010 3
1 1000110 3
2 0100010 2
3 1101110 5
4 0110000 2
5 0110111 5
6 0110010 3
7 0111010 4

01 10 0010000 1
12 21 0000010 1
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0100010 2 match 2
45 54 0000010 1
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0010000 1

02 20 1000100 2
13 31 0100010 2 match 2
24 42 0000010 1
35 53 0000010 1
46 64 0110000 2 match 4
57 75 0000000 a
60 06 1010000 2
71 17 0010000 1

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 0110010 3 match 0 6
25 52 0000010 1
36 63 0100000 1
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0110000 2 match 4
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 0010000 1
15 51 0000010 1
26 62 1000000 1
37 73 0000000 a
